lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You helped that merchant carry water yesterday. I saw it.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: He looked like he'd pay for it later. Business, not charity.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Maybe. Or maybe you're kinder than you admit to yourself.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Don't make me regret the warmth in this place, Alon.
